title: Pet London Iced Donut Set Plush Dog Toy, 2-Pack Assorted 4" Doughnut Fast Food Toy, Donut Soft Squeaky Fun Interesting Soft Puppy Dog Toy, Food Drink Chew Dog Interactive Toy
features: 🐩 HIGH QUALITY DONUT SOFT PLUSH - High quality materials used in design & manufacture of this plush dog toy. Made from a super soft plush that your furry friend will love to touch and interact with. A safe and soft option for gentle chewers and teething puppies

🐩 SQUEAKER HIDDEN INSIDE - Iced Donut Plush dog toy contains a sound sac that will squeak if the dog squeezes on it - attracting the dog's attention and making it more interesting to play with. Dogs love the squeaky sound found hidden inside keeping them entertained around the clock

🐩 PERFECT FOR BONDING WITH YOUR PET - You can interact with your pet with this toy. This soft plush stuffed dog toy can increase the affection between you and your pet. Can be used for toss & fetch games and watch they fly across the room!

🐩 INTERESTING SHAPE, DESIGN & TEXTURE - This dog plush toy is machine washable as an added benefit. The interesting texture will keep them entertained and interacting over and over again. Can be the perfect snuggle toy for bedtime too!

🐩 Measures 5" ACROSS - PERFECT CARRY SIZE - Part of PetLondon's 'Humanised' Dog Toy Collection filled lots of different instantly recognisable toys from woodland creatures, fast food milkshakes, burgers & fries and much more! From British Designer Based in the Capital - PetLondon
description: Nom Nom Nom, a set of two delicious dog donuts. Plush toy with squeaker inside. Adorable picture opportunities! These plush donut dog toy will look so cute in your pup's mouth and is sure to get people talking! Made with the highest quality materials, these donut shaped dog toys not only look great but are likely to become your four pets favourite! Makes for a great fetch toy to interact with your dog: the donuts can be tossed like a Frisbee. The unique shape with the hole in the middle makes it very easy for your pet to pick up this item and hold it in their mouth. Each donut is approximately 4 inches round. Available in vanilla, chocolate and strawberry-each set has two assorted flavours. Sold as a set of 2 toys on carded display. The Fast Food from PetLondon's Barkery Collection is a delicious selection of high quality soft dog and puppy toys in the shape of America's favourite fast food treats. These exceptionally designed and quality super soft plush dog toys made to look like the real thing. The insantly recognisable collection is perfect to keep pets entertained during dinner time so they don't feel left out
